I was initially a bit apprehensive about Creed III, as I thought the other two were a bit cliche in their story line. Jonathan Majors was incredible and completely carried the film; what impressive acting and physical transformation! Huge respect to  MBJ for his directorial debut, the quality of direction and production was so much higher than previously. Great storyline, more grit than the other two films. Fantastic graphics and sound as well in the fighting scenes 👏🏼 🔥

I was so excited to see this  based on the trailer.. It was bad.. Just a bad script,  too many extended conversation scenes to push movie time to the 2 hour mark.. I can honestly say Michael B did his best directing it, but if he had any hand in the script that's where it failed.. I honestly believe I could do a non-directors "cut" of that movie and make it better, but the sad thing is it would only be 45 minutes long if I did..  I was disappointed,  I really wanted it to be as good as the trailer made it seem.. If Michael B's end game was just to get my $$ from seeing it, then he succeeded.. But I won't make the same mistake again..

The Creed films are very entertaining (especially for an ex boxer) but for me they fall short of the Rocky movies simply because I don't care much for the lead character (Adonis) whereas in the Rocky movies you listened to every word Rocky said but to me the character of Adonis has never been fully developed, I even found myself rooting for Drago's son in the last film as we learned more about his character than Adonis's.

I just saw the 3rd installment a few hours ago 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾 great work 🥊🥊🥊 though, there's one thing which bothers me a lil' bit. We know the whole saga is focused on Adonis. Ok I fully get it, but we also know that Apollo had other children (two, at least). So, where are they now ? Why didn't we hear anything about them since Creed saga started ? I really hope that Creed 4 could fix it. It could bring more substance in the family drama and would be cool for the next Creed installments. Think of it, guyzzz 🙏🏾🙏🏾🙏🏾

Good movie & MBJ did a good job directing for the first time. He definitely learned from Ryan Coogler. I read an article mentioning that MBJ said he wanted the film to be anime af. Well, there are indeed moments that are anime af & I wont spoil them. 

One thing to talk about though, there is potential for a Creed 4 that follows the daughter. And you know what would be cool? Her VS Rocky's granddaughter. Another Creed VS Balboa. If not that, then Creed's daughter VS a Lang.

But Idk if sign language can carry a whole movie. It can carry characters(and they seem to ALWAYS be cool characters. Flash's final season has a villain that speaks in sign language & I like her right away). But a film entirely?

And before anyone mentions the Planet Of The Apes Prequel trilogy, humans were in those films too. So it wasnt 100% sign language from the apes.

And the protag not talking would definitely lower the hype for the training montage & the final fight.
